display_title: Slay the Spire 2:Field of Man-Sized Holes
wikitext:
{{Event Header|StS2 Field Of Man-Sized Holes.png}} {{E|Field of Man-Sized Holes|2}} is an {{2|Events|Event}} found exclusively in the {{2|Hive}}. == Options == {{Frame|Enter Your Hole}} {{TS|positive||[[StS2:Enchantments|Enchant]] a card with {{KW|Perfect Fit||2}}.}}
{{Frame|Resist}} {{TS|positive||Remove 2 cards from your Deck.}} {{TS|negative||Add {{C|Normality||2}} (curse) to your Deck.}} == Conditions == * Only appears if you have at least 1 card that can be enchanted with Perfect Fit. == Dialogue ==
The sudden sight of a massive field, {{TS||shake|gouged with large outlines of bodies}}, stops you in your tracks. One of these outlines matches your own. {{TS|orange|up|It's perfect...}}
{{Frame|Enter Your Hole}}
It's a snug fit, but you squeeze yourself into the hole... The further you go, {{TS|purple|up|the darker it becomes}}. Eventually, you see a {{TS|gold||faint light}} grow brighter and reveal the other side. You step out unchanged, but now understand the {{TS|green||intimate secrets of life}}.
{{Frame|Resist}}
You walk past all the holes, even the one carved perfectly in your shape... Why didn't I go inside? What would have happened? Have I been in that hole before? Who made these holes? What is... who... where?
== Trivia == This event is a reference to the manga [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Gyo#The_Enigma_of_Amigara_Fault "The Enigma of Amigara Fault" by Junji Ito]. [[Category:Events]] [[Category:Slay the Spire 2 Content]]
